name: /audit-pack: bundles the evidence section sourced from compliance/evidence/<control>/ per-control dirs (C-9)
command: mkdir -p compliance/evidence/CC8.1 && printf 'evidence-screenshot.png\n' > compliance/evidence/CC8.1/manifest.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --evidence-dir "$PWD/compliance/evidence" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section evidence && grep "CC8.1" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep -E "evidence|manifest" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
